prompt: Compare v2.4.8 vs v2.5.0 for the prism-validate skill.
expected_output: Runs each eval case twice â€” once with the v2.5.0 SKILL.md and once with the v2.4.8-snapshot SKILL.md. Produces a side-by-side comparison showing pass rate deltas and token usage differences.
expectations: Identifies comparative mode from the two version numbers in the prompt
